commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a schema-validated `reviewMetrics` decision field, persists it in review report front matter, renders a compact PR review metrics digest, updates prompt guidance, and adds parser/rendering tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the requested `reviewMetrics` capability and the PR adds it across schema, parsing, rendering, prompt guidance, and tests.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor proof plus maintainer review of a live automation schema change; no narrow code defect is available for an automated repair lane.

target.title: feat: Add review metrics digest
target.body:
## Summary
- Add schema-validated reviewMetrics entries to review decisions
- Persist and render a compact Review metrics digest near PR surface stats
- Add prompt guidance and tests for no, one, and multiple metrics

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/191

## Validation
- tsgo -p tsconfig.json
- tsgo -p tsconfig.repair.json
- tsgo -p tsconfig.dashboard.json
- node --test test/*.test.ts
- node --test test/repair/*.test.ts dist/repair/*.test.js with local environment shims for commit signing and pnpm availability
- coverage commands equivalent to repo check passed
- oxfmt --check
target.author: takhoffman
